New York City faces significant challenges as subway services falter post-blizzard, sanitation crews struggle with snow removal, and a three-alarm fire injures five in Brooklyn, while Mayor Mamdani addresses public safety and housing issues amid rising voter concerns about affordability.

### Risks & Alerts

- NYC subway service disrupted as riders return following blizzard. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilwFBVV95cUxNOUgzcXE0ZGcyUDdqcmtjS3R4aFE0VkVfLTFQay1GV1I4VGhHQ0ZlWUI0RnZMdDBFRUV1LUxkQlE1VWxzODV0aHZFXzVjY3Q5NDNJSmstMFlWOGU0Z08tbGlrT29OZ0dmTHVzOVFETnZXcnpOM3loT0g1RkR0aEo1eTdyTmF2T0FzOHVjenRhbFhKLVBIcmhJ?oc=5)
- Five injured in a three-alarm fire on Church Ave in Brooklyn. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihwFBVV95cUxOckJSd1YxSDhYUzh0TDhWMmp6NkxsZl83TnF1YW1kWUZHeGhCSWMxWWp2eEpSRHBPTEluM1JaN29kZ3QxT3otMDRDeklhSHE1NnpxdUNxMTduSFY3aUV0T2haZUx1WHp0R3poeldPdFhOLVV5TzI0UjlKTXZSaC1faGZXQXhURWs?oc=5)
- Sanitation crews struggling to clear Staten Island after winter blizzard; low school attendance reported. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)

### Civics & Politics

- NYC Mayor Mamdani responds after multiple NYPD officers injured by snowballs in Washington Square Park. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
